subcodes.first_line: The petition hath been received, and the response wherewith the Mighty, the Bestower, speaketh in the Kingdom hath been graced through the mention of God, glorified be His glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عریضه رسید و جواب ما ینطق به العزیز الوهاب فی الماب از قبل بذکر حق جل جلاله فائز
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
